verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That those are more severely judged, who in this world have had more power.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In Solomon: “The hardest judgment shall be made on those who govern.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: For to a mean man mercy is granted; but the powerful shall suffer torments mightily.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the second Psalm: “And now, ye kings, understand; be amended, ye who judge the earth.”
